name: PKLYN
description:
PKLYN is a dedicated indoor pickleball venue in Brooklyn, NYC.

We offer professional indoor pickleball courts, lessons, open play, leagues, clinics, private court rentals, and pickleball events for all skill levels.

Designed specifically for pickleball, PKLYN provides high-quality playing experience with the best court surfaces, lighting, and pickleball community. If you’re new to pickleball or a competitive player, PKLYN is Brooklyn and NYC's go-to facility for year-round indoor pickleball.

Located in Brooklyn and easily accessible from Manhattan and Queens, PKLYN hosts daily pickleball programming, corporate events, tournaments, and social play. If you’re searching for indoor pickleball in Brooklyn or NYC, PKLYN delivers top-tier courts.
